# Casa Dodo Guatape

> Boutique apartments with lake views in Guatape, Colombia.

Casa Dodo Guatape offers 3 stylish, fully-equipped apartments in the heart of Guatape, Antioquia, Colombia. Each apartment features lake views, modern amenities, and a unique design. Located steps from the main square and the famous zocalos.

## Apartments
- **Apartment 201**: 2 bedrooms, 2 bathrooms, kitchen, balcony. Sleeps 4.
- **Apartment 202**: 1 bedroom, 1 bathroom, kitchen, private patio. Sleeps 2.
- **Apartment 301**: 3 bedrooms, 3 bathrooms, kitchen, balcony. Sleeps 6.

## Amenities
- Complimentary breakfast
- Free WiFi
- Fully-equipped kitchens
- Quality bathroom amenities
- Lake view balconies
- Pet-friendly

## Location
Carrera 32 Calle 31-28, Guatape, Antioquia, Colombia

## Contact
- Website: https://casadodoguatape.com
- WhatsApp: +57 313 731-7997
- Email: casadodoguatape@gmail.com
- Instagram: @casadodoguatape

## Ratings
- Booking.com: 9.8/10 (219 reviews)
- Check-in: 3:00 PM / Check-out: 12:00 PM
